result.stdout:
Usage: package-update-skill <PackageName> <FromVersion> <ToVersion> [--model 
<model>] [--dir <repoDir>] [--paranoid] [--debug]
Example: dnx PackageUpdateSkill Newtonsoft.Json 12.0.3 13.0.3 --model gpt-5

Options:
  --model <model>   LLM model to use (default: gpt-5)
  --dir <repoDir>   Repository root directory (default: current directory)
  --paranoid        Enable injection detection — scans external content for
                    prompt injection attempts, adds defensive prompts, and
                    generates a security report
  --debug           Keep intermediate output/validation files after completion

Environment variables:
  GITHUB_TOKEN      (optional) GitHub PAT — falls back to Copilot SDK auth
